description: and4, or4, and alu return correct outputs for every test case, including the wrap-around case where ADD overflows past 15
and4/or4 apply AND/OR per bit; alu computes all four results then selects with mux4 by opcode (reusing add4, sub4, mux4)
Correct use of get_bit to extract bits and shift/OR to reassemble 4-bit results
